_note: Curated visuals for the 'How it looks' canvas. Each entry maps to a PR in wins.json. type=iframe loads an HTML demo from looks/, type=image loads a PNG. Add new entries as before/after assets are produced.

items.caption: Structural admin elements now respect the user's WP admin color scheme — no more hardcoded blues.
Hardcoded grays in Woo admin retoned to align with WP 7.0 — calmer, less murky text.
When admin loses connectivity, merchants now see WP core's offline notice — no more silent save failures.
Removed the persistent task list reminder bar that nagged stores well past onboarding.
